heading: Safety programs
label: 3705 Safety programs
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)370540:333(f)., as added , , .Pub. L. 87–581, title I, § 107(f)Pub. L. 91–54, § 183 Stat. 98Aug. 9, 1969
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)370540:333(f)., as added , , .Pub. L. 87–581, title I, § 107(f)Pub. L. 91–54, § 183 Stat. 98Aug. 9, 1969

children.text: provide for the establishment and supervision of programs for the education and training of employers and employees in the recognition, avoidance, and prevention of unsafe working conditions in employment covered by this chapter; and
collect reports and data and consult with and advise employers as to the best means of preventing injuries.
